title: Friends Remover Mobile Edition
excerpt: Mobile Edition is coming soon alongside a major Unfriend History overhaul, improved stability, stronger security systems, performance upgrades, and major UI improvements.
body:
For almost a year, Friends Remover has been ONE of the many extensions to help you get rid of your Roblox friends on PC. However, as a removal extension, we aren't really that special. Sure, we have unfriend history, background removals, and more, but I want something better. I want a bigger way to stand out maybe for users to use Friends Remover on mobile.

And that's where Friends Remover Mobile Edition comes in. We have been experimenting, and we are preparing the beta version of Friends Remover for mobile!

Android
How does it work?

1. Go to your Play Store.
2. Search for "quetaa."
3. Download the app.
4. Go to our extension page by searching for "Chrome Web Store" and looking up "Friends Remover."
5. Click "Add to Chrome."

And boom! Mobile support will soon be available on Android devices. iOS support will be available soon after.

added.moreInfo: Added a back button to navigate out of Unfriend History.
You can now dismiss entries in Unfriend History.
A custom logo now appears when Unfriend History is open.
Added captcha protection for more actions like pin spam and untrusting friends.
AFK warning system now uses a toast notification instead of a banner.
Settings UI redesigned for mobile devices.
Swipe between friends on mobile devices.
Rate-limits sensitive actions and requires captcha when needed.
Background polling speed now adjusts based on friend count.

removed.moreInfo: Removed legacy top bar from Unfriend History.
Simplified menu to only include View Profile.

fixed.moreInfo: Fixed history loading local data instead of server data.
Fixed redirecting back to friends list.
Fixed headshots incorrectly cycling in Unfriend History.
Fixed inactive friends settings and background removal issues.

improved.moreInfo: Made Unfriend History match Friends List design.
Background changes now wait for API recovery before syncing.
Medium: 3–5 captchas, Large: 5–7, Massive: 8–10, Full removal: 10.
Headshot quality now adjusts based on friend count.
Now also reduces headshot sizes for performance.
Removed excessive background logs causing lag.
Updated to use newer inactive friends API.
History limit set to 775 entries with warning instead of trimming.

security.moreInfo: Cannot cancel removal when fewer than 7 friends remain.

other.moreInfo: Uses headshot search button in Unfriend History.
Settings now fully supported on mobile devices.
Added top bar, hamburger menu, and sidebar drawer.
API status banner can now be dismissed.
Captcha sessions only save after at least one correct answer.
